archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) infused with Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) for dark mode

buttons.primary: min-h-[48px] px-6 rounded-xl font-semibold tracking-wide transition-all duration-200 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FF6B00] to-[#FF8A33] text-white shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,107,0,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(255,107,0,0.6)] hover:-translate-y-1 active:translate-y-0 text-lg flex items-center justify-center
buttons.emergency: min-h-[48px] px-6 rounded-xl font-bold tracking-wide transition-all duration-200 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FF4081] to-[#D500F9] text-white shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,64,129,0.5)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,64,129,0.8)] hover:-translate-y-1 active:translate-y-0 text-lg flex items-center justify-center animate-pulse

components_and_surfaces.cards: bg-[#111742] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6 sm:p-8 hover:border-[#D500F9]/50 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(213,0,249,0.15)] transition-all duration-300 relative overflow-hidden group
components_and_surfaces.inputs: min-h-[48px] bg-[#0A0D29] border border-white/20 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder-white/40 focus:border-[#FF6B00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF6B00] transition-all text-lg w-full

animations.page_transition: Framer Motion: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}, animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}, transition={{ duration: 0.4 }}
animations.hover_effects: Cards slightly lift (-translate-y-1) and their borders glow with neon purple or green based on category.
animations.voice_feedback: Framer Motion loops: scale and opacity pulsing of concentric circles around the microphone icon to represent listening/processing.
animations.loading_state: Animated scales of justice using CSS keyframes (rocking -5deg to 5deg, slowing down to 0deg balance).
animations.card_flip: Framer Motion: rotateY from 0 to 180 on click for interactive rights display cards.

accessibility_requirements.minimum_text_size: 18px (text-lg in Tailwind) for all readable content to support semi-literate users.
accessibility_requirements.touch_targets: Strict 48x48px minimum for ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs).
accessibility_requirements.contrast: Ensure text over vibrant gradients uses text-shadow or a darker underlay to maintain WCAG AA contrast.
accessibility_requirements.voice_first: Keep workflows linear ('one-breath'). Provide visual feedback (captions) synchronized with voice output.
accessibility_requirements.data_testid: Required on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='voice-query-button').

hero_background.description: Abstract glowing neon sound waves blending into scales of justice

panic_button_visual.description: 3D glowing neon pink emergency panic button for visual reference

voice_wave.description: 3D glowing sound wave equalizer in neon saffron and green

justice_scales.description: Statue of justice with scales on dark background

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the UI primarily using the Dark Mode theme, utilizing the deep Navy (#0A0D29) app background and lighter Navy (#111742) for cards to ensure high contrast.

Apply Saffron (#FF6B00) as the primary brand/action color. Use the Neon accents (Green for success/rights, Purple for legal categories, Pink for emergency) dynamically as gradients or glowing shadows on cards and text.
CRITICAL ACCESSIBILITY: Set global base font size to 18px (`text-lg`). Make sure no interactive element (button, input, toggle) is smaller than 48x48px.
Use 'Work Sans' for all headings to provide an authoritative yet approachable feel, and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text for maximum legibility.
Build the Voice-First interface with the provided `voice_wave` image as a background or use Framer Motion to create pulsing concentric circles when the microphone is active.
Implement the Emergency Panic Button as a fixed, highly visible Glassmorphism element, using a pulsating Neon Pink gradient and heavy drop shadow.
Create interactive rights cards that flip (using Framer Motion `rotateY`) on click to reveal details in simple language.
For the loading state, build a custom component that uses CSS to animate the scales of justice rocking back and forth until balanced.

Use Shadcn UI for structured components (OTP forms, Dialogs), but strip the default 'Vercel-look'. Heavily customize them to match the dark neon civic tech aesthetic (larger text, thicker borders, custom focus rings).
All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based).
